incorrects.description: Student selected 55, which is the sum of pizza and salad instead of the difference

steps.text: How many more asks us to compare. When we compare, we subtract to find the difference. How many more is pizza than salad?

incorrects.description: Student selected 30, possibly confusing categories or misreading values

steps.text: Check the values carefully. Pizza is 45. Salad is 10. To find how many more, subtract the smaller from the larger.

incorrects.description: Student selected 15, which is the value of burgers, not the difference between pizza and salad

steps.text: How many more means we compare pizza to salad. Pizza is 45, salad is 10. Subtract to find the difference.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Animation demonstrates comparing Pizza bar (45) to Salad bar (10), showing subtraction 45 minus 10 equals 35.

steps.text: Let me show you. How many more tells us to compare by subtracting. Pizza is 45. Salad is 10. We subtract: 45 minus 10 equals 35. The answer is 35 because that's the difference between pizza and salad.
